> I curate a weekly multimodal AI roundup, here are the open-source image &amp; video highlights from the last week: * Motif-Video 2B * Open-source 2B DiT, 720p at 121 frames, one checkpoint for both T2V and I2V. * 83.76% on VBench Total, highest among open-source, beats Wan2.1-14B at 7x fewer parameters.
